categories.description: A delegation was created — sent to both delegator + delegate as confirmation.
A pending delegation just crossed starts_at + is now effective. Sent to the delegate — 'you can now act as X'. Include the role name + expiry + revoke-early link.
Fired 24 hours before an active delegation ends_at. Reminds both delegator + delegate. Delegator may extend (rare) or plan handover; delegate is reminded their exercise window is closing.
Fired at ends_at. Sent to delegator confirming the delegation window closed.
Fired when the delegator (or admin) revoked before ends_at. Sent to both delegator + delegate + revoke_reason.

CANNOT-OPT-OUT. Regulatory notice sent to the impersonated tenant User the moment their account starts being impersonated by an Academorix staff member. Names the operator + department + reason + support ticket reference (when provided). Regulatory basis: SOC 2 CC6.1 + PCI-DSS 8.5 mandated notice — the tenant User has an inalienable right to know their account is being operated by someone else. is_read_only sessions include a badge on the notification saying 'read-only session'.
categories.regulatory_note: This category CANNOT be disabled by tenant admins or by the recipient User under any tier. Attempts to opt out are refused at the notifications module with a compliance-explanation response.

categories.description: CANNOT-OPT-OUT. Sent to the impersonated tenant User confirming the session ended + summarising duration + end_trigger + any actions the operator took (writes count from audit-stream aggregation). Companion to the started notification.
Fired when a super_admin extends the session past 60 minutes (rare — requires impersonation_extended_ttl entitlement). Sent to the impersonated User + the security team (Slack #security channel).

Fired on end_trigger=security_lockdown. Sent to the impersonated User + the security team (Slack #security channel) + PagerDuty for on-call awareness. Include termination_reason. High-severity — indicates a security event.
